name: clearspeaker
description: Clean selected text and read it aloud with smooth xAI speech.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

commands.name: speak-text
commands.title: Read Selection Aloud
commands.description: Cleans selected text, skips code and links, then reads it aloud with smooth xAI speech.

preferences.name: xaiApiKey
preferences.title: xAI API Key
preferences.description: Stored locally by Raycast and used to call xAI's text-to-speech API.

preferences.name: voiceId
preferences.title: Voice ID
preferences.description: xAI voice to use for speech.

title: ClearSpeaker
author: octavian_tocan
